name: 06-04-visitor-reply-composer-coach
title: Visitor-side roleplay reply composer coach
description: Add local, non-blocking composer guidance so visitors can turn normal questions into in-character action/dialogue replies instead of asking NPCs what they can do.
creator: lijin
notes: Completed frontend-only visitor reply composer coach. Validation passed: typecheck, build, diff --check, Playwright desktop/mobile visual acceptance. react-doctor was attempted but blocked: sandbox npm cache EPERM, escalated unpinned npm execution rejected for supply-chain risk. No API/Schema/database change; example button only fills textarea and never auto-sends.
